case_title: HILL, MICHELE vs. OSAGIE, OROBO IND & DBA AMENEX INSURANCE AGENCY

docket_entries.description: DECISION AFTER TRIAL AND ORDER TO PREPARE JUDGMENT. CLERK'S CERTIFICATION OF SERVICE BY MAIL.
